title: The Straw Hats Turn the Raid Around
description: On pages 18–21, this part focuses on Unknown person #17, Straw Hat Pirates, Unknown person #18, Unknown person #19, Unknown person #20 as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've just received a report of fighting at the Port.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why don't you shoot some cannonballs at us, you jerks!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then I could bounce 'em back at you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we get many more of those iron spears in our hull...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...we're gonna end up at the bottom of the sea for sure!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Isn't there anything we can do?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're putting holes in us faster than I can board them up!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's hard enough protect- ing just one side!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: We're Outnam- Bered Eight To One!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wish this were hand- to-hand combat! Then we'd have the edge!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They can fight or they can try to run, but they'll never...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the specialty of the black cage squad-- the black spear formation.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems like a hundred years since I saw him last!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's that nasty, violent cook and his gang!! I'll sink you all!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Today I'll prove to you that I'm not a weirdo!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, Mr. Hypnotist, aren't you a pirate too?!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 48 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
